description_long: This internet cafe is a rectangular, single-story building with a flat roof and a minimalist exterior. The main facade features a series of large, dark-tinted windows and several doors, framed by vertical concrete or stone columns, giving it a modern and functional appearance. The side and rear walls are mostly plain, with only a few small doors visible, suggesting limited access points. The exterior is predominantly light gray, with contrasting brown and black elements on the doors and window frames. There are no visible signs, advertisements, or decorative features, emphasizing a utilitarian design. The building appears to be constructed primarily from concrete or similar materials, with glass used for the windows.
description: A modern, rectangular internet cafe with a flat roof, large front windows, and minimal exterior detailing in gray and brown tones.
description_view_0: The side of the building is mostly plain, with a single dark door visible near the corner.
description_view_1: This view shows the main facade with large, dark windows and multiple brown doors, framed by vertical columns.
description_view_2: The front of the building is visible, featuring a row of windows and doors, with the main entrance area clearly defined.
description_view_3: The rear or side of the building is shown, with a single brown door and a plain gray wall.
